notes: Community-aggregated data (PokePatch 1,000+ packs, corroborated by ThePriceDex community estimates). Per-pack odds: double rare 1/6 and ultra rare 1/15 in the rare slot; ACE SPEC 1/20 replacing the first reverse-holo slot; illustration rare 1/12, special illustration rare 1/67 and hyper rare 1/144 replacing the second reverse-holo slot. Confidence medium: no dedicated TCGplayer Infinite study, and sources diverge on SIR (1/64-1/87) and hyper rare (1/118-1/144) odds. Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. Special set: no booster box display (ETB and booster bundles only).
